_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: NF90-8, S462 and ST888-14 human MPNST cells were treated with STAT3 and Ref-1 siRNA, resulting in a reduction in the amount of protein by >85%
details: Resulted in reduction of protein by >85% versus scrambled siRNA controls on day 3 post transfection
